title: payena engleri
intro: Payena engleri, also known as the Payena engleri plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Payena engleri plant are said to include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Payena engleri plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
